game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **MathLand: Maths pour enfants:** Players control Ray the pirate in a 2D educational adventure game, navigating through over 25 distinct levels across various cursed islands to recover stolen sacred stones. The core gameplay loop involves guiding Ray through platforming segments, avoiding environmental hazards like quicksand and enchanted parrots, and then solving specific math puzzles to unlock progress or retrieve a stone from a chest. Math puzzles are presented as interactive mini-games requiring players to tap the correct answer for operations such as addition, subtraction, multiplication tables, or ordering numbers, with difficulty scaling based on selected age groups (e.g., 5-6 year olds focus on 1-10 sums, while 9+ year olds tackle negative numbers and division). Progression is linear through the levels, with new islands becoming accessible after collecting a certain number of sacred stones and potentially acquiring a "spyglass" item, which is earned by completing specific sets of math challenges. The user interface features a virtual joystick for character movement and contextual tap interactions for puzzle solving, with incorrect answers typically resulting in a retry prompt rather than a hard failure state, and the ultimate goal being to complete all math challenges and restore order.
game_info.description: Guide Ray the pirate through cursed islands to recover stolen sacred stones! Navigate platforming challenges, avoid hazards like quicksand and enchanted parrots, and solve math puzzles to unlock treasure chests. Each island features unique challenges with math problems scaled to your skill level. Collect all sacred stones across multiple levels to restore order to MathLand. Progress through islands by mastering addition, subtraction, multiplication, and number ordering challenges!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Ray left/right and jump
Space: Answer math puzzles (select highlighted option)
Z: Interact with chests and progress triggers
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start game
Escape: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. Validates that Ray can move, jump, and interact with basic game elements like platforms and collectibles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move Ray through the first level using arrow keys and jumps. Test basic collision detection with platforms and ground. Attempt to collect items and interact with objects.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Ray successfully navigates platforms, collision detection works correctly, and basic interactions function properly. Position updates reflect movement inputs accurately.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete game win strategy. Tests the full gameplay loop from start to finish, solving math puzzles and collecting all sacred stones to achieve victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through all levels systematically, solving math puzzles correctly by analyzing the problems and selecting correct answers. Collect all sacred stones from chests, avoid hazards, and progress through each island until reaching the final goal.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all levels, solve all math puzzles, collect all sacred stones, and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score reflects all collected stones and completed challenges.

TEST_3.test_description: Math puzzle solving accuracy test. Validates the math puzzle generation and answer validation system across different difficulty levels.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Trigger multiple math puzzles throughout gameplay. Test correct answer selection, incorrect answer handling, and puzzle difficulty progression. Verify retry mechanics work properly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Math puzzles generate correctly, answer validation works accurately, incorrect answers prompt retry without game over, and difficulty scales appropriately with progression.

TEST_4.test_description: Hazard avoidance and damage system testing. Validates environmental hazards like quicksand and enchanted parrots deal appropriate damage and player health management works.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally interact with hazards to test damage mechanics. Verify health decreases appropriately, invincibility frames work, and game over occurs when health depletes completely.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Hazards deal damage correctly, health system updates properly, visual feedback shows damage taken, and game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when health reaches zero.
TEST_4.description: Hazard avoidance and damage system testing. Validates environmental hazards like quicksand and enchanted parrots deal appropriate damage and player health management works.

TEST_5.test_description: Level progression and stone collection testing. Validates that collecting sacred stones unlocks new levels and islands properly.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Collect sacred stones sequentially, verify level unlock conditions, and test island progression. Ensure the spyglass item becomes available after collecting required stones.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: New levels unlock after collecting specific numbers of stones, island progression works smoothly, spyglass acquisition functions correctly, and progression gates prevent skipping content.
